title: AI Assistant Columns

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I am trying to show a Mirrored column text in the AI column.

For Example After connecting to a column the Mirror column shows AB, I want the AI Text column to show AB.

I’ve been asking all the wrong ways, and either it is empty or no result. Thank you!

posts.author: pjtgrizzly (Reid)
posts.cookedHtml: same here - a mirror column shows up in writing assistant and I type in “display exact text” to display in a text field and it shows correct in the Preview but nothing displays in the field after save and apply
